chunks.content:
Article: If Rei had a motto what would it be
[]: If Rei had a motto, what would it be?             Quote Post by Doublegee » Tue Mar 25, 2014 10:00 pm "Actions speak louder than words"? "The needs of the many outweigh the needs of the few"? "I'm surrounded by f*cking idiots"?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Mar 25, 2014 10:18 pm "Why are my clones fondling each other?"

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Mar 25, 2014 10:30 pm this has pretty much already been answered. "It comes with the job."

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Mar 25, 2014 10:32 pm "Same day, different clone."

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Tue Mar 25, 2014 10:35 pm "It's a living."

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Mar 25, 2014 10:44 pm "If I die, I can be replaced."

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Mar 25, 2014 11:01 pm I don't think Rei is a motto kind of person. Misato or Mari, hell yes, Asuka maybe, Gendo... not in the traditional way, but either his line from Q about how everything exists only as a tool to subvert SEELE, or ep 26's "because it's the only way to live" sum him up pretty well. Rei's not the sort of person who spends much time thinking about who she wants to be or present to the outside words, or what would be something desirable to do. She kind of just goes, and does it. Usually whatever she thinks is required of her, ocassionally also what she wants. There isn't that much of a filtering and reoganizing between her immediate impulses and her actions... But I guess if she did have one, this, Doublegee wrote: "Actions speak louder than words"

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Mar 25, 2014 11:06 pm Guy Nacks wrote: "If I die, I can be replaced."

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Wed Mar 26, 2014
